name: In the Rocky Mountains: A Tale of Adventure
author: Kingston, William Henry Giles
body:
The Young Rajah: A Story of Indian Life and Adventure. By W. H. G.
KINGSTON. With Forty-four Engravings. Crown 8vo, cloth. Price 5s.

The Wanderers; or, Adventures in the Wilds of Trinidad and up the
Orinoco. By W. H. G. KINGSTON. With Thirty-one Engravings.
Crown 8vo, cloth. Price 5s.

Twice Lost: A Story of Shipwreck, and Adventure in the Wilds of
Australia. By W. H. G. KINGSTON. With Forty-six Engravings.
Crown 8vo, cloth. Price 5s.


NEW AND ENLARGED EDITION.

The Arctic World Illustrated: Its People, Plants, Animals, and Natural
Phenomena. With a Historical Sketch of Arctic Discovery, and a Narrative
of the British Expedition of 1875-76. With Twenty-five Full-page, and
One Hundred and Twenty other Engravings, and a Tinted Map of the Polar
Regions. Royal folio, cloth extra, full gilt. Price 15s.

Recent Polar Voyages. A Record of Adventure and Discovery. From the
Search after Franklin to the Voyage of the _Alert_ and the _Discovery_
(1875-76). With Sixty-two Engravings. Crown 8vo, cloth. Price 6s. 6d.

The Catacombs of Rome: Historical and Descriptive. With a Chapter on the
Symbolism of Early Christian Art. By W. H. DAVENPORT ADAMS.
With Forty-seven Engravings. Post 8vo, cloth. Price 3s. 6d.

The Threshold of Life: A Book of Illustrations and Lessons for the
Encouragement and Counsel of Youth. By W. H. DAVENPORT ADAMS.
With Six Engravings. Post 8vo, cloth. Price 2s. 6d.

Nature's Mighty Wonders. By the Rev. RICHARD NEWTON, D.D. With
Fifty-three Engravings. Post 8vo, cloth. Price 2s. 6d.




Works on Natural History.

RICHLY ILLUSTRATED.


Animal Life throughout the Globe. An Illustrated Book of Natural
History. With Thirty-six Full-page, and upwards of Two Hundred other
Engravings. Crown 8vo, cloth extra. Price 6s.

Beautiful Birds in Far-off Lands: Their Haunts and Homes. By
MARY and ELIZABETH KIRBY, Authors of "The World at Home," &c.
With Sixteen Exquisitely Coloured Illustrations. Crown 8vo,
cloth extra. Price 5s.

Sea Birds, and the Story of their Lives. By ELIZABETH SURR.
With Illustrations printed in Colours. 18mo, cloth extra. Price 2s. 6d.

Natural History of the Bible. With Illustrations printed in Colours.
18mo, cloth extra. Price 2s. 6d.

Pictures and Stories of Natural History. First and Second Series. Each
containing Eighteen Engravings printed in Colours, and numerous
Woodcuts. Small 4to, cloth extra, illuminated side. Price 3s.

The Monsters of the Deep, and Curiosities of Ocean Life. A Book of
Anecdotes, Traditions, and Legends. With upwards of Seventy Engravings.
Post 8vo, cloth extra. Price 3s. 6d.

Stories of Bird Life: A Book of Facts and Anecdotes Illustrative of the
Habits and Intelligence of the Feathered Tribes. By HENRY
BERTHOUD. With One Hundred Illustrations. Post 8vo, cloth extra.
Price 3s. 6d.

Stories of the Sagacity of Animals. By W. H. G. KINGSTON,
Author of "In the Eastern Seas," &c. With Sixty Illustrations by
HARRISON WEIR. Crown 8vo, gilt edges. Price 5s.

Our Four-Footed Friends and Favourites. Stories Illustrative of Animal
Sagacity. With Seven Illustrations. Post 8vo, cloth. Price 2s.


T. NELSON AND SONS, LONDON, EDINBURGH, AND NEW YORK.
